channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Curated geopolitical news from Tier 1 sources

item.title: ⚖️ US Trade Court Rules Trump Tariffs Illegal, Blocks 10% Global Levy
item.description: A federal trade court ruled that President Trump exceeded his authority with new 10% global tariffs, though the order only applies to importers who sued. The administration plans to appeal. | Category: US Politics | Source: Reuters

item.title: ⚔️ US Navy Came Under Iranian Missile Fire After Attacking Oil Tanker
item.description: Iranian state media reports US naval forces in the Strait of Hormuz came under missile fire following a US attack on an Iranian oil tanker, marking a significant escalation in the Gulf conflict. | Category: US-Iran War | Source: Reuters

item.title: 🇰🇵 North Korea Deploys Artillery at Border to Hit Seoul
item.description: Kim Jong Un inspected production of artillery with 60km+ range to be deployed at the South Korean border, bolstering its ability to strike Seoul and other targets. | Category: Asia-Pacific | Source: Reuters

item.title: 💥 China Fireworks Factory Blast Kills 37, One Missing
item.description: The death toll from a fireworks factory explosion in Hunan province rose to 37 with one person still missing, making it China's deadliest industrial blast since 2019. | Category: Asia-Pacific | Source: Reuters

item.title: 🇮🇷 US Disables Two More Iranian Tankers as Hormuz Tensions Rise
item.description: The US military fired on and disabled two additional Iranian tankers amid escalating tensions in the Strait of Hormuz, as the UAE announced air defenses engaging threats. | Category: US-Iran War | Source: AP News

item.title: 🤖🇺🇸 US Marine Corps Seeks Robots to Build Expeditionary Airfields
item.description: The Marine Corps is developing robotic systems to construct forward airfields, part of its Force Design 2030 modernization. The initiative aims to reduce personnel needs and speed up deployment in contested environments. | Category: Defense Industry | Source: Defense News

item.title: 🇺🇦⛽ Ukraine Strikes Russian Oil Refinery in Perm for Third Time
item.description: Ukrainian forces hit the Lukoil-Permnefteorgsintez refinery in Perm, marking the third strike on the facility in two weeks. The attacks are part of Ukraine's campaign against Russian energy infrastructure. | Category: Ukraine-Russia War | Source: Kyiv Independent

item.title: 🤖⚔️ Ukraine Deploys 25,000 Ground Robots for Front-Line Combat
item.description: Ukraine is producing 25,000 unmanned ground vehicles to serve as "cavalry" on the front lines, reducing casualties and replacing lost hardware. The robots represent a major shift in modern warfare tactics. | Category: Military | Source: The Telegraph

item.title: 🇷🇺 Russia and Ukraine Trade Ceasefire Accusations as Moscow Prepares Victory Day Parade
item.description: Both nations accused each other of violating ceasefires ahead of Russia's WWII commemoration under tight security, while fighting continues despite temporary truces. | Category: Ukraine-Russia War | Source: Reuters

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine Running Short on Air Defense Missiles After Russian Winter Campaign
item.description: Ukraine's air force warned of critical shortages in air defense missiles following Russia's winter bombing campaign, as Kyiv braces for further strikes while peace talks stall. | Category: Ukraine-Russia War | Source: Reuters

item.title: 🇨🇳 China's Export Growth Accelerates in April Amid Iran War Stockpiling
item.description: Chinese exports are expected to show strong growth in April data, driven partly by global supply chain disruptions and stockpiling related to the Iran conflict. | Category: US-China | Source: Reuters

item.title: 🇮🇷 US Expects Iran's Response Friday as Ceasefire Holds After Strait Clashes
item.description: Washington anticipates Iran's response to peace proposals on Friday, while Trump maintains the ceasefire is holding after recent clashes in the Strait of Hormuz disrupted global oil shipping. | Category: US-Iran War | Source: Reuters

item.title: 🌍 Rubio Questions Allied Support on Iran After Italy Meeting
item.description: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio questioned why allies including Italy are not backing Washington's efforts to confront Iran and reopen the Strait of Hormuz, highlighting transatlantic tensions over the conflict. | Category: Diplomacy | Source: Reuters

item.title: 🇪🇺 European Countries Emerge as NATO Leaders as US Role Recedes
item.description: European nations are taking on greater leadership roles within NATO as the United States shifts focus toward the Indo-Pacific and reduces its traditional security commitments to the alliance. | Category: Europe | Source: NPR

item.title: 🇺🇸💬 Rubio Admits US Peace Mediation in Ukraine Has Gone Nowhere
item.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio acknowledged that US efforts to broker peace between Russia and Ukraine have stalled, with no progress on key issues. | Category: Ukraine-Russia War | Source: Kyiv Independent

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine's Tuapse Strikes Challenge Russian Oil Defenses
item.description: Ukraine has repeatedly struck the Tuapse oil refinery on Russia's Black Sea coast, exposing gaps in Russian air defense coverage and raising questions about Moscow's ability to protect critical infrastructure. | Category: Ukraine-Russia War | Source: Kyiv Independent

item.title: 🇮🇱⚔️ Iran War Updates: US-Iran Tensions, Regional Impact
item.description: Ongoing coverage of the US-Iran conflict, including diplomatic developments, military operations, and regional implications as both sides navigate an uncertain ceasefire. | Category: US-Iran War | Source: NPR

item.title: 🇺🇸 Can Trump Pull Thousands of US Troops Out of Germany?
item.description: President Trump's proposed withdrawal of US forces from Germany faces logistical, political, and strategic hurdles as European allies express concern about NATO's eastern flank. | Category: Europe | Source: Reuters

item.title: 💻 US Suspects Nvidia Chips Smuggled to China via Thailand
item.description: A firm linked to Thailand's national AI initiative is suspected of helping smuggle billions of dollars' worth of advanced Nvidia chips to China via Super Micro servers, circumventing US export controls. | Category: US-China | Source: Reuters

item.title: 💰 Dollar Firms as US-Iran Hostilities Flare, Yen Steadies on Intervention Risk
item.description: The US dollar strengthened against major currencies amid Middle East tensions, while the Japanese yen found support from intervention concerns as geopolitical risks dominate currency markets. | Category: Economy | Source: Reuters

item.title: 🇬🇧 David Attenborough Turns 100, 'Overwhelmed' by Birthday Wishes
item.description: British naturalist and broadcaster Sir David Attenborough celebrated his 100th birthday, receiving messages from around the world honoring his decades of work documenting the natural world. | Category: Europe | Source: Reuters

item.title: 🇸🇪 Sweden's Gripen Fighter Jet Deal With Ukraine Progressing Well
item.description: Sweden's defense minister said negotiations on providing Gripen fighter jets to Ukraine are proceeding well, as Kyiv seeks to modernize its air force amid the ongoing war with Russia. | Category: Defense Industry | Source: Reuters

item.title: 🇳🇬 Nigeria Court-Martial Over 2025 Coup Plot
item.description: Nigeria's military court is prosecuting officers accused of plotting a coup in 2025, one of the most serious threats to civilian rule in Africa's most populous nation. | Category: Africa | Source: France 24

item.title: 🇹🇷 Turkish Defense Firms Secure $8B in Deals at SAHA Expo
item.description: Turkish defense companies signed $8 billion in contracts during the opening days of SAHA Expo, showcasing Turkey's growing defense industry and export ambitions. | Category: Defense Industry | Source: Daily Sabah
